title: El fantasma del convento
writer: Jorge Pezet, Fernando de Fuentes, Juan Bustillo Oro
actors: Marta Roel, Enrique del Campo, Carlos Villatoro
plot: Alfonso (Del Campo), Eduardo (Villatoro) and Eduardo's wife Cristina (Ruel) get lost when visiting a forest. A strange monk finds them and takes them to an ancient convent. There, the three amigos suffer personality changes, speci...
